name: Autolus Therapeutics plc
business: Autolus Therapeutics is an early commercial-stage biopharmaceutical company developing next-generation programmed T cell therapies for cancer and autoimmune diseases. Their first approved product is AUCATZYL (obe-cel) for adult relapsed/refractory B-cell acute lymphoblastic leukemia (r/r B-ALL), which launched in the US in early 2025 and in the UK in December 2025. The company also has a pipeline of other programmed T cell product candidates in clinical and preclinical development.
sellsTo: Third-party payors including government health programs and private insurers

exposures.sentence: We are an early commercial-stage biopharmaceutical company developing next-generation programmed T cell therapies for the treatment of cancer and autoimmune diseases.

We currently integrate artificial intelligence (AI) in certain of our research and development activities, including identification of potential product candidates, and are seeking to further integrate AI throughout our business.

The use of AI by us and our business partners may lead to novel and urgent cybersecurity risks, which could have a material adverse effect on our operations and reputation as well as the operations of any of our business partners.

catalysts.event: Full enrollment of Phase 2 trial of obe-cel in pediatric r/r B-ALL
catalysts.sentence: The Phase 2 portion of the trial is underway and Autolus expects to have the trial fully enrolled in the first half of 2027.

catalysts.event: Initial data from Phase 1 BOBCAT trial of obe-cel in progressive multiple sclerosis
catalysts.sentence: Initial data from the Phase 1 trial are expected to be reported at the end of 2026.

catalysts.event: Initial data from Phase 1 ALARIC trial of AUTO8 in light-chain amyloidosis
catalysts.sentence: The first patient was dosed in the Phase 1 ALARIC trial evaluating AUTO8 in light-chain amyloidosis and initial data is expected to be reported at the end of 2026.
